creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-26 16:47:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/pm3umpdl       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This allows a M3U file to be loaded into musicpd. This is useful
  for loading stuff from some audio streaming sites to be loaded
  into musicpd.
  
  PR:             ports/120377
  Submitted by:   Zane C. Bowers
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.955     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/audio/pm3umpdl/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/pm3umpdl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/pm3umpdl/pkg-descr (new)
